allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=erestro psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U erestro -d postgres -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS pgflux_v2_test;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=erestro psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U erestro -d pgflux_v2_test -c "CREATE ROLE app_writer NOLOGIN;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=pgflux psql -h localhost -p 5440 -U pgflux -d pgflux -c "CREATE ROLE app_writer NOLOGIN;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=pgflux psql -h localhost -p 5440 -U pgflux -d pgflux -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS pgflux_v2;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=pgflux psql -h localhost -p 5440 -U pgflux -d pgflux -c "CREATE DATABASE pgflux_v2;")
